# workspace-admin-mcp

> Minimal MCP server for Rocket.Chat generated by rc-mcp.

**Generated by [rc-mcp](https://github.com/thekishandev/MCP-Server-Generator)** — Minimal MCP Server Generator for Rocket.Chat.

## Tools (13)

| Tool | Method | Endpoint | Description |
|------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `statistics` | GET | `/api/v1/statistics` | Get Last Statistics |
| `engagementdashboard_users_activeusers` | GET | `/api/v1/engagement-dashboard/users/active-users` | Get Active Users |
| `users_list` | GET | `/api/v1/users.list` | Get Users List |
| `users_update` | POST | `/api/v1/users.update` | Update User Details |
| `users_setActiveStatus` | POST | `/api/v1/users.setActiveStatus` | Set User&#x27;s Status Active |
| `roles_list` | GET | `/api/v1/roles.list` | Get Roles |
| `roles_create` | POST | `/api/v1/roles.create` | Create Role |
| `roles_update` | POST | `/api/v1/roles.update` | Update Role |
| `roles_addUserToRole` | POST | `/api/v1/roles.addUserToRole` | Assign Role to User |
| `roles_getUsersInRole` | GET | `/api/v1/roles.getUsersInRole` | Get Users of a Role |
| `settings` | GET | `/api/v1/settings` | Get Private Settings |
| `settings__id` | GET | `/api/v1/settings/{_id}` | Get Setting |
| `login` | POST | `/api/v1/login` | Login with Username and Password |

## Quick Start

### 1. Install dependencies

\`\`\`bash
npm install
\`\`\`

### 2. Configure environment

\`\`\`bash
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your Rocket.Chat credentials
\`\`\`

### 3. Build and run

\`\`\`bash
npm run build
npm start
\`\`\`

### 4. Use with gemini-cli

Add to your \`settings.json\`:

\`\`\`json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "workspace-admin-mcp": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": ["./dist/server.js"],
      "env": {
        "RC_URL": "http://localhost:3000",
        "RC_USER": "your-user",
        "RC_PASSWORD": "your-password"
      }
    }
  }
}
\`\`\`

## Development

\`\`\`bash
# Run in development mode (no build step)
npm run dev

# Run tests
npm test
\`\`\`
